name: Hdfs.Contents
description: Returns a table containing a row for each folder and file found at the folder URL, `url`, from a Hadoop file system. Each row contains properties of the folder or file and a link to its content.

name: Hdfs.Files
description: Returns a table containing a row for each file found at the folder URL, `url`, and subfolders from a Hadoop file system. Each row contains properties of the file and a link to its content.
